medium_findings.summary: No X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff header on API responses
medium_findings.action: Recommended follow-up: add nosniff header globally in API bootstrap

medium_findings.summary: MIME validation is header-only; no magic-byte verification; SVG must remain excluded
medium_findings.action: Document assumption; deny-list SVG for operators; consider magic-byte check in future cycle

low_findings.summary: HTML comment bypass in event-handler pattern (pre-existing, non-exploitable in practice)
javascript:/vbscript: context-free matching (intentional correct design decision)
URL-encoded scheme bypass (pre-existing, mitigated by client-side sanitizeUrl)
Content-Disposition filename injection risk (negligible; filename sanitized at upload)

notes: M1 and M2 are pre-existing or architectural gaps; they do not block this subtask.
Subtask-8 changes (sanitizer anchoring, memoryStorage, JSDoc) introduce no new security issues.
Coordinator may record this subtask complete.
